name: Case of Longstanding Friendship
history: Longstanding friendship with Ethan since high school (about 14 years). Shared personal crises and professional collaborations. Learned that Ethan has been abusive toward his girlfriend.
worthless_belief: I am bad - dangerous, toxic, evil
intermediate_belief: I must protect others from harm.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am responsible for the well-being of those around me.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of confrontation, seeking advice from others.
auto_thought: If I confront Ethan, I might lose the friendship or make things worse.
behavior: Avoids direct communication with Ethan, possibly seeks indirect ways to address the issue.
